descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeated Kelowna 5-4 in overtime during B.C. Junior League playoff game.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes player Tony Bobbin (18) collides with Kelowna defenceman Allan Schuler (4) during a B.C. Junior League playoff game on Wednesday. Richmond won the match 5-4 in overtime. The photo captures an intense moment from the playoff action.

attribution.headline: CRAIG HODGE HEADING FOR a crash landing
